creator: _jkrow
caption:
Our world is SO BEAUTIFUL 😭

This is The Great Blue Hole and the Belize Barrier Reef in Belize and I highly recommend adding it to the top of your travel wish list. You can scuba dive into the hole, but I think it’s best seen from the air on a scenic flight with Tropic Air. 

Just make sure to take your Dramamine before you go if you get sick on little planes! 

———

🌴 🇧🇿 Belize is one of my favorite countries in the world and I have tons of free guides on my bl0g, The Adventures Atlas, to help you plan your next trip, including:
• The best things to do on Caye Caulker
• The places to see in Belize
• A complete road trip itinerary including Mayan Ruins • Tips for renting a car and driving in Belize

Check the 🔗 on my profile or Say BELIZE and I’ll send it to you!

Follow for more adventures and places you might not know about ✨

transcription.text: The dogs are on it by 4, about 430 feet deep. We're going to head to the coast, 1 mile to the north, 1 mile to the east side.
